subcodes.first_line: O true friends and cherished handmaidens of God! Jinab-i-Munir hath donned the pilgrim's robe of the true Ka'bah, that he may [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی و کنیزان عزیزان الهی جناب منیر احرام کعبه حقیقی بربست تا
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
